title: rootless: check that / is mounted as shared
body:
if the root mount '/' is not mounted as MS_SHARED, print a
warning, otherwise new mounts that are created in the host won't be
propagated to the rootless mount namespace.

Closes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/10946

[NO TESTS NEEDED]

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

Is this going to warn all the time?  If I have a system that is built with no / as private, will podman constantly complain?

> Is this going to warn all the time? If I have a system that is built with no / as private, will podman constantly complain?

just the first time when we create the user+mount namespace.
so the first time after use login, everytime.

/lgtm
Might need an option eventually to turn this off,  we shall see.
